subcodes.first_line: According to the command, those beloved and chosen ones must act in such wise as shall conduce to the joy and exultation of the state [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حسب الامر باید آن محبوبان و اولیا عمل نمایند آنچه را که سبب فرح و سرور دولت
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise of Western values; culture, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @obedience to and respect for government authority, @goodly deeds; actions
